creator: andrkaz@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Rodrigo Osorio from comment #5)
I upgrade Freebsd to 11.2 Release and try upgrade c-icap. Failed.

mv -f .deps/memcached_cache_la-memcached.Tpo .deps/memcached_cache_la-memcached.Plo
1 error

*** [all-recursive] Error code 1

1 error

make[3]: stopped in /usr/ports/www/c-icap/work/c_icap-0.5.5
*** [all] Error code 2

===> Compilation failed unexpectedly.

Stop.
